message:
fix(mux): fix panel scale/zoom on creation and after heavy output

Two fixes for wrong scale/aspect ratio:

1. Defer sendCreatePanel/sendSplitPanel via rAF when getBoundingClientRect
   returns 0 (tab content has display:none before selectTab adds .active).
   Previously fell back to 800x600 defaults, creating the ghostty surface
   at wrong dimensions.

2. Send buffer stats periodically via setInterval, not just on frame
   arrival. After heavy output (e.g. lsd), AIMD quality tier drops but
   couldn't recover during idle because checkBufferHealth was only called
   per-frame. Idle terminals now report good health so the server upgrades
   the tier back.
